_meta.description: Master taxonomy for BioTechStocks screener -- L1.L2.L3(.L4) hierarchical tags
rules: Every L3 term must appear under exactly ONE L1.L2 parent (no duplicates across branches)
L4 sub-segments nest under L3 when a market has distinct drug niches (e.g. dmd.gene_therapy, dmd.exon51)
Disease classification follows the organ/system affected, not the treatment mechanism
No 'multi_indication' catch-alls -- use the lead/primary indication
Rare diseases get 'rare: true' on the indication object, not the area tag
Commercial products need penPct set to actual market share (revenue / TAM)

display_names.kinase_inhibitor: Kinase inhibitor (kinases are enzymes; separated by pharma convention)
display_names.protein_protein_inhibitor: Protein-protein interaction inhibitor (PPI / BH3-mimetic / surface mimetic)

prostate_cancer.description: Prostate cancer all stages (nmCRPC + mHSPC + mCRPC + BCR)

nsclc_all.description: NSCLC all driver/IO subtypes + adjuvant peri-operative

kidney_disease_specialty.description: Specialty nephrology (IgAN + LN + AMKD + ADPKD + C3G + AAV + FSGS + pMN)

polycystic_disease.description: Polycystin-driven cystic disease (PKD1/PKD2) -- kidney + liver organ involvement

attr_amyloidosis.description: TTR amyloidosis spectrum (cardiomyopathy + polyneuropathy) -- one platform target, two phenotypes

amyloidosis_all.description: All amyloidoses across distinct misfolded proteins (TTR + AL + AA + Aβ) -- shared deposition pathology, distinct platforms / organs. Append new amyloid-disease areas here when added (e.g. hematology.rare_blood.al_amyloidosis).

complement_mediated.description: Complement-driven diseases across hematology + nephrology + neuromuscular (C5 / Factor B / Factor D / C3 inhibitor competitive arena)

heart_failure_spectrum.description: Heart failure across phenotypes (HCM + HFpEF + HFrEF + ATTR-CM + PH-HF) -- overlapping patient populations

pulmonary_hypertension.description: PH all subtypes (PAH + PH-HFpEF + PH-HFrEF + PH-ILD) -- one drug class arena (sotatercept, prostacyclins, ERA, sGC stimulator)

anemia_spectrum.description: Anemia across CKD + rare hematology (HIF-PHI + EPO + pyruvate kinase activator + GT/editing platforms)

lysosomal_storage_disease.description: LSDs (Gaucher + Fabry + Pompe + MPS1 + ASMD) -- ERT + GT platform competition

muscular_dystrophy.description: Muscular dystrophies + neuromuscular (DMD all sub-types + FSHD + DM1 + LGMD + SMA + CMS) -- ASO/GT/editing for muscle

obesity_all.description: Obesity all etiologies (general incretin-driven + rare genetic monogenic forms)

thrombosis_spectrum.description: Thrombosis pharmacology (anticoagulation + antiplatelet + reversal + thrombolysis) -- DOACs, Factor XI, P2Y12, reversal agents

organic_acidemia.description: Organic acidemias (PA + MMA + future MSUD/IVA/glutaric) -- branched-chain amino acid catabolism disorders, ultra-rare, no DMT today, mRNA replacement and GT platforms emerging

stroke_spectrum.description: All stroke clinical settings: prevention (AFib-driven embolic via anticoagulation), acute treatment (thrombolytic <4.5h window), and post-stroke recovery / neuroprotection. NOTE: anticoagulation + thrombolytic L3s are broader than just stroke (also cover VTE / PE / MI) -- this group surfaces drugs across stroke settings, not stroke-only sales aggregates.

cancer_vaccine_adjuvant.description: Adjuvant / peri-operative oncology arena: post-resection ctDNA-MRD-driven therapy across NSCLC + melanoma + CRC + PDAC + MIBC. Cancer vaccines (MRNA-4157 intismeran, BNT122 autogene cevumeran), 1-year IO adjuvants (Keytruda, Opdivo), peri-op IO+chemo. Distinct competitive set from advanced/metastatic disease in same organ.

epilepsy_spectrum.description: Epilepsy + DEE (developmental encephalopathies, including Dravet + SYNGAP1) -- ASOs / sodium channel / 24-OH inhibitor platforms

sarcoma_all.description: All sarcomas / mesenchymal tumors (GIST + classical STS + TGCT + desmoid + NF1-PN)

autoimmune_glomerulopathy.description: Antibody / immune-complex mediated kidney diseases (clinically nephrology, mechanistically autoimmune)

autoimmune_spectrum.description: Cross-organ autoimmune diseases (immunology + derm autoimmune + autoimmune glomerulopathies + neuromuscular autoimmune)
